title: oenothera flava var. acutissima
intro: Oenothera flava var. acutissima, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and astringent properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Oenothera flava var. acutissima include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its oil is extracted for use in skincare products and as a dietary supplement.
